meaning: Charge Modulated Device,电荷调制器件
examples: Press Ctrl/Cmd + N to create a new document.
Select settings.php, then press Cmd + I.
Hitting Cmd-Z with this method helps someone to make a decision about whether the edit they just made is what they wanted.
Needless to say, I lost the argument about the default behavior (what got assigned to Cmd-Z for out of the box installation) with the introduction of History feature.
